title.en: The man England will fear most - Haaland fires Norway to history
title.zh-CN: 英格兰最害怕的人-哈兰德将挪威烧成历史

summary.en: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup games and he is the striker that nobody wants to face as he fires Norway into an historic quarter-final.
summary.zh-CN: 埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）在世界杯的四场比赛中打进了7球，当他将挪威队打入历史性的四分之一决赛时，他是没有人愿意面对的前锋。

title.en: England win epic against Mexico to reach quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队战胜墨西哥队，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores twice and Harry Kane converts a penalty as 10-man England beat Mexico 3-2 in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）得分两次，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在世界杯上以10人英格兰队3-2击败墨西哥队

title.en: Where does Mexico win rank among England's best results?
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥在哪里赢得英格兰最好的成绩？

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at some of England's most famous away victories after their epic win against Mexico at the Azteca - plus you can have your say.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道（ BBC Sport ）回顾了英格兰在阿兹特克（ Azteca ）战胜墨西哥后取得的一些最著名的客场胜利-此外，您还可以发表意见。

title.en: 'Referees just not good enough' - Tuchel anger over penalty
title.zh-CN: “裁判不够好” - Tuchel对点球的愤怒

summary.en: England head coach Thomas Tuchel said referees at the World Cup "are just not good enough" after the dramatic last-16 win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，在过去16场戏剧性的战胜墨西哥之后，世界杯的裁判“还不够好”。

title.en: Who produced another iconic performance? England player ratings
title.zh-CN: 谁制作了另一场标志性的表演？英格兰球员评分

summary.en: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell rates how the Three Lions players performed in the last-16 win over Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）对三狮队球员在过去16场战胜墨西哥的比赛中的

title.en: Ageing Brazil need major surgery - but is Ancelotti the man to do it?
title.zh-CN: 巴西老龄化需要大手术-但是安切洛蒂是这样做的人吗？

summary.en: There was nothing unlucky about Brazil's loss to Norway in the last 16 of the World Cup and their exit at this stage is an unmitigated disaster, writes Tim Vickery.
summary.zh-CN: Tim Vickery写道，巴西在世界杯的最后16场比赛中输给挪威并没有什么不幸，他们在这个阶段的退出是一场彻头彻尾的灾难。

title.en: England into quarter-finals - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰进入四分之一决赛-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在进入四分之一决赛后需要做些什么才能进入决赛。

title.en: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca
title.zh-CN: 贝灵汉在98秒内以2分击败阿兹特克

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）在墨西哥城体育场的最后16场比赛中，在98秒内打进2球，让英格兰队以2比0领先

title.en: 'Nasty, nasty challenge' - Quansah shown red card
title.zh-CN: “讨厌，讨厌的挑战” - Quansah出示红牌

summary.en: England are reduced to ten men as Jarrel Quansah is shown a red card following a VAR review for a "nasty" challenge on Mexico's Jesus Gallardo.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队减少到10人，因为Jarrel Quansah在墨西哥的Jesus Gallardo进行了“令人讨厌”的挑战后，在VAR审查后被出示了一张红牌。

title.en: 'I'm speechless' - Kane reacts to England's victory over Mexico
title.zh-CN: “我哑口无言” --凯恩对英格兰战胜墨西哥的反应

summary.en: A very hoarse sounding England captain Harry Kane gives his reaction to England's 3-2 victory over Mexico and praises the fans support.
summary.zh-CN: 听起来很沙哑的英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）对英格兰队以3比2战胜墨西哥队做出了反应，并赞扬了球迷的支持。

title.en: What Haaland's home town did when Norway beat Brazil
title.zh-CN: 当挪威击败巴西时，哈兰德的家乡做了什么

summary.en: Watch how Erling Haaland's hometown of Bryne reacted to their hero scoring both goals as Norway knocked out Brazil to advance to the quarter-final of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 观看Erling Haaland的家乡Bryne在挪威击败巴西晋级世界杯四分之一决赛时如何回应他们的英雄进球。

title.en: How 'remarkable' Haaland lead Norway to win over Brazil
title.zh-CN: 哈兰德如何“非凡”地带领挪威赢得巴西

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards look at how "absolute monster" Erling Haaland inspired Norway to victory over Brazil in the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育世界杯专家韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）、乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）和米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）探讨了“绝对怪物”埃尔林·哈兰德（ Erling Haaland ）如何激励挪威在世界杯的最后16场比赛中

title.en: 'Sportsmanship in question' after decision to suspend Balogun red card
title.zh-CN: 决定暂停Balogun红牌后的“体育精神有问题”

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Wayne Rooney, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards react to the decision to suspend the red card shown to the USA's Florian Balogun during their round of 32 tie with...
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育世界杯专家韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）、乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）和米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）对在与美国选手弗洛里安·巴洛根（ Florian Balogun ）的32轮比赛中暂停向他们展示红牌的决

title.en: Three Lions roar at alti-Jude! Bellingham and Kane send 10-man England to QFs after thriller
title.zh-CN: 三只狮子对着alti-Jude咆哮！贝林汉姆和凯恩在惊悚片后将10人英格兰送到QFS

summary.en: England are through to the World Cup quarter-finals after earning one of their greatest knockout results by eliminating co-hosts Mexico with a gutsy 3-2 victory in an extraordinary tie at the Azteca.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在阿兹特克队以3比2的胜利淘汰了联合主办国墨西哥队，赢得了他们最大的淘汰赛之一，进入了世界杯四分之一决赛。

title.en: England ratings: Bellingham shines but heroic defence secures QF spot
title.zh-CN: 英格兰评级：贝灵厄姆闪耀，但英勇的防守确保了QF位置

summary.en: England held on for an excruciating 3-2 win against Mexico thanks to a heroic defensive performance to book their place in the quarter-finals of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队凭借英勇的防守表现，在世界杯四分之一决赛中取得了令人痛苦的3-2胜利。

title.en: World Cup latest: 'Neymar retires from international football'
England’s 10 men hang on after Kane penalty to beat Mexico in World Cup thriller

summary.en: File it as England’s finest World Cup knockout phase victory since 1966. There have not been a huge number of them; only nine previously, each a gripping drama in its own right. Yet it was the...

title.en: Trump thanks Fifa after USA striker Balogun's ban suspended

summary.en: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.

title.en: Haaland sends Norway into quarter-finals as Brazil crash out

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice for Norway as they beat Brazil 2-1 at the New York New Jersey Stadium to reach the quarter-finals of the World Cup for the first time.

title.en: Haaland double fires Norway into World Cup quarter-finals

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway knock out five-time champions Brazil, and progress to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Queiroz leaves Ghana following World Cup exit

summary.en: Carlos Queiroz steps down as Ghana head coach after three months in charge following their World Cup exit.

title.en: Real Madrid sign defender Dumfries from Inter Milan

summary.en: Real Madrid sign Netherlands full-back Denzel Dumfries from Inter Milan on a four-year deal.

title.en: France survive Paraguay's 'disgraceful' and 'embarrassing' dark arts

summary.en: After dismantling all before them at this World Cup, France had to find a new way to win against a Paraguay side whose use of the dark arts angered many of those watching.

title.en: France overcome resolute Paraguay to reach quarter-final

summary.en: World Cup favourites France book their quarter-final place thanks to Kylian Mbappe's second-half penalty against a stubborn Paraguay side in Philadelphia.

title.en: Mexico could bring the best out of  Tuchel's England

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards feel the way Mexico play could bring out the best of Thomas Tuchel's England side.

title.en: England enter the Azteca - where football kings are crowned

summary.en: BBC Sport explores the history and cultural power of the Azteca, one of the great cathedrals of world football, as England prepare to face Mexico there in the last 16 of the World Cup.

title.en: Your views as England beat Mexico in World Cup classic
England latest: Henderson suffers 'really bad' injury during celebrations
Golden Boot race: Kane moves one behind Haaland, Mbappe and Messi

summary.en: Erling Haaland has moved level with Kylian Mbappe and Lionel Messi in the race for the Golden Boot at the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Brazil stunned as Haaland's masterclass sends Norway into last eight

summary.en: Erling Haaland dumped Brazil out of the World Cup at the last-16 stage as his brilliant late double secured a 2-1 win for Norway to set up a quarter-final against England.
